insert into pm_project_header (projectType, projectCode, projectName, projectState, isback, column001, column002, column003, column004, column005, column006, column007, column008, column009, column010, column011, column012, columno12_readonly, column013, customerProjectName, salesType, compId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, projectStartTime, projectRefreshTime, projectCloseTime, customInfo, customConfig, column014) values (#{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isback,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column001,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column002,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column003,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column004,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column005,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column006,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column007,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column008,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column009,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{column010,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column011,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column012,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columno12_readonly,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{column013,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectCloseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{customConfig,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{column014,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

select * from pm_project_header
projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectCode = #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectName = #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectState = #{model.projectState, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isback = #{model.isback, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column001 = #{model.column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column002 = #{model.column002, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column003 = #{model.column003, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column004 = #{model.column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column005 = #{model.column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column006 = #{model.column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column007 = #{model.column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column008 = #{model.column008, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column009 = #{model.column009, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
column010 = #{model.column010, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column011 = #{model.column011, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
column012 = #{model.column012, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
columno12_readonly = #{model.columno12_readonly, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
column013 = #{model.column013, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customerProjectName = #{model.customerProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
salesType = #{model.salesType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compId = #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectStartTime = #{model.projectStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectRefreshTime = #{model.projectRefreshTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectCloseTime = #{model.projectCloseTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=CHAR} AND
customConfig = #{model.customConfig, jdbcType=CHAR} AND
column014 = #{model.column014, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
( projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectState like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or isback like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column001 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column002 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column003 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column004 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column005 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column006 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column007 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column008 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column010 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column011 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column012 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column013 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customerProjectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or salesType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customConfig like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or column014 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by projectId desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}
